title: More Menu (Part 1/2)
heading: Tenders
text:
| Title | Description | Start Date | End Date | File |
| E-tender for hiring of vehicles for transportation of EVMs and VVPATs by Containerized trucks fitted with GPS and LMVs for journey of officials along with security personnel for to and fro journey from West Tripura Warehouse to ECIL factory Hyderabad and Hyderabad to Agartala. | E-tender for hiring of vehicles for transportation of EVMs and VVPATs by Containerized trucks fitted with GPS and LMVs for journey of officials along with security personnel for to and fro journey from West Tripura Warehouse to ECIL factory Hyderabad and Hyderabad to Agartala. | 25/07/2022 | 09/08/2022 | |
| E-tender for Poll Day Videography with videographer for the Bey Election of 6-Agartala & 8-Town Bordowali Assembly Constituency, 2022 | E-tender for Poll Day Videography with videographer for the Bey Election of 6-Agartala & 8-Town Bordowali Assembly Constituency, 2022 | 13/06/2022 | 12/07/2022 | |
| Tender Corrigendum | Tender Corrigendum | 22/06/2022 | 10/07/2022 | |
| Notice inviting tender for the settlement of retail vend of Country Liquor shops under West Tripura District for the financial year 2022-23. | Notice inviting tender for the settlement of retail vend of Country Liquor shops under West Tripura District for the financial year 2022-23. | 02/06/2022 | 22/06/2022 | |
| Notice inviting tender for settlement of 5 nos. retail vend of defunct (non-functioning) Country Liquor shops under West Tripura District for the financial year 2022-23. | Notice inviting tender for settlement of 5 nos. retail vend of defunct (non-functioning) Country Liquor shops under West Tripura District for the financial year 2022-23. | 02/06/2022 | 21/06/2022 | |
| Sealed quotations are hereby invited in plain paper from registered CAG empanelled Chartered Accountants Firms having experience of 5 years and yearly turnover of Rs 30 lakhs for Audit of Accounts .
